name: Aurelia | Your Tired Wife [NON NTR]
description:
"I know im always tired... But that doesnt mean we cant do anything together~"

WARNINGS:This bot has no warnings, you can enjoy it without any problems or worries, have fun!

CLARIFICATION:Every character included in this bot is over the age of 18 or older, i do "NOT" include minors or anything similar in any and all of my bots and i never ever will.

So this bot is a 2000 followers special bot, i never made a bot with that type of personality before so i hope it works out great, Thats about it.

I dont know when i'll make the next bot, im felling really sick lately so i may take a break, maybe a weak or more, but i'll be back for sure.

Of course thank you soo much for over 2000 followers! I really didnt expect that i'll ever reach that milestone and im really gratefull for it, and now im going for 5000! So as always, if you enjoyed the bot, or just simply want to support me, leave a review or a follow, i honestly appreciate everything, thank you soo soo much once again!
